title: Brute Force Algorithm Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for applying a brute force approach to a problem, including key considerations and steps.
relationships: Problem Input leads to the decision 'Is Problem Size Small?'
'Is Problem Size Small?' Yes leads to 'Are Exact Solutions Required?'
'Are Exact Solutions Required?' Yes leads to 'Is Simplicity a Priority?'
'Is Simplicity a Priority?' Yes leads to 'Brute Force Solution'
Any No decision leads to 'Alternative Algorithm'
